mapper.select: SELECT id, hazard_type AS hazardType, hazard_level AS hazardLevel, hazard_source AS hazardSource, user_id AS userId, area_code AS areaCode, address, longitude, latitude, hazard_desc AS hazardDesc, rectify_start_date AS rectifyStartDate, rectify_end_date AS rectifyEndDate, submit_user_name AS submitUserName, submit_time AS submitTime, assignee_id AS assigneeId, is_self_rectify AS isSelfRectify, hazard_photo AS hazardPhoto, rectify_status AS rectifyStatus, rectify_photo AS rectifyPhoto, rectify_video AS rectifyVideo, rectify_time AS rectifyTime FROM gas_hazard_info WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT h.id, h.hazard_type AS hazardType, h.hazard_level AS hazardLevel, h.hazard_source AS hazardSource, h.user_id AS userId, u.user_name AS userName, h.area_code AS areaCode, CONCAT( IFNULL(l1.area_name, ''), IF(l1.area_name IS NOT NULL AND l2.area_name IS NOT NULL, '/', ''), IFNULL(l2.area_name, ''), IF(l2.area_name IS NOT NULL AND l3.area_name IS NOT NULL, '/', ''), IFNULL(l3.area_name, '') ) AS areaNameDisplay, h.address, h.longitude, h.latitude, h.hazard_desc AS hazardDesc, h.rectify_start_date AS rectifyStartDate, h.rectify_end_date AS rectifyEndDate, h.submit_user_name AS submitUserName, h.submit_time AS submitTime, h.assignee_id AS assigneeId, w.name AS assigneeName, h.is_self_rectify AS isSelfRectify, h.hazard_photo AS hazardPhoto, h.rectify_status AS rectifyStatus, h.rectify_photo AS rectifyPhoto, h.rectify_video AS rectifyVideo, h.rectify_time AS rectifyTime FROM gas_hazard_info h LEFT JOIN gas_user u ON h.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN gas_worker w ON h.assignee_id = w.id LEFT JOIN tbl_area_node l3 ON CASE WHEN h.area_code LIKE '%/%/%' THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(h.area_code, '/', -1) ELSE NULL END = l3.code LEFT JOIN tbl_area_node l2 ON CASE WHEN h.area_code LIKE '%/%/%' THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(h.area_code, '/', 2), '/', -1) WHEN h.area_code LIKE '%/%' THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(h.area_code, '/', -1) ELSE NULL END = l2.code LEFT JOIN tbl_area_node l1 ON CASE WHEN h.area_code LIKE '%/%' THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(h.area_code, '/', 1) ELSE NULL END = l1.code WHERE h.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gas_hazard_info ( hazard_type, hazard_level, hazard_source, user_id, area_code, address, longitude, latitude, hazard_desc, rectify_start_date, rectify_end_date, submit_user_name, submit_time, assignee_id, is_self_rectify, hazard_photo, rectify_status ) VALUES ( #{hazardType}, #{hazardLevel}, #{hazardSource}, #{userId}, #{areaCode}, #{address}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{hazardDesc}, #{rectifyStartDate}, #{rectifyEndDate}, #{submitUserName}, #{submitTime}, #{assigneeId}, #{isSelfRectify}, #{hazardPhoto}, #{rectifyStatus} )
mapper.update: UPDATE gas_hazard_info SET hazard_type = #{hazardType}, hazard_level = #{hazardLevel}, hazard_source = #{hazardSource}, user_id = #{userId}, area_code = #{areaCode}, address = #{address}, longitude = #{longitude}, latitude = #{latitude}, hazard_desc = #{hazardDesc}, rectify_start_date = #{rectifyStartDate}, rectify_end_date = #{rectifyEndDate}, submit_user_name = #{submitUserName}, assignee_id = #{assigneeId}, is_self_rectify = #{isSelfRectify}, hazard_photo = #{hazardPhoto}, rectify_status = #{rectifyStatus}, rectify_photo = #{rectifyPhoto}, rectify_video = #{rectifyVideo}, rectify_time = #{rectifyTime} WHERE id = #{id}
